title: Neighbors Not Enemies Act
plain_summary: The Neighbors Not Enemies Act removes an old law that gave the president special powers during wars. This old law let the president arrest and kick out people from other countries if the United States was at war with their home country or if their country threatened to attack America. The bill was introduced by Representative Omar and other members of Congress in January 2025. By removing this law, the government would no longer have these special powers to remove people based on what country they come from during wartime.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Neighbors Not Enemies Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Repeal of Alien Enemies Act
sections.text: This section removes sections four thousand sixty seven through four thousand seventy of the Revised Statutes of the United States. These sections are found in title fifty of the United States Code, sections twenty one through twenty four. These sections made up what was called the Alien Enemies Act.
